page_metadata.biotools__summary: DeepAPS is a tool for automatic Phenotyping Segmentation. DeepAPS is a composite method that combines two readily available algorithms in order to create a precise mask for an animal image. DeepAPS allows for the rapid and accurate quantification of multiple phenotypic measurements while minimizing study cost.
